title: APIv2 PCR Prep 4/4: PCR
author: Opentrons
materials: for 96 samples using the P20 Multi-channel pipette. --- * [P20 Multi-channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) * [10/20uL Opentrons tipracks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips) * [Bio-Rad Hard Shell 96-well PCR plate 200ul #hsp9601](bio-rad.com/en-us/sku/hsp9601-hard-shell-96-well-pcr-plates-low-profile-thin-wall-skirted-white-clear?ID=hsp9601) * [Labcon 0.2mL PCR strips #3940-550](http://www.labcon.com/microstrips.html) * Labcon Plate * PCR Cooler --- Slot
96-well Labcon plate on PCR cooler Slot
Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Pre-Chilled PCR Cooler with PCR strip...
steps.instruction: Pre-Chilled PCR Cooler with PCR strip placed in column 1 and filled with master mix Slot 3: [Aluminum Block Adapter](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/aluminum-block-set) with 96-well PCR plate filled with DNA samples (from EXO step 3/

steps.title: 96-well PCR plate filled with primers Slots 5-11
steps.instruction: 96-well PCR plate filled with primers Slots 5-11: [10/20ul Opentrons tiprack](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-10ul-tips)

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
